nasb.text: But the officers who came did not find them in the prison; and they returned and reported back,

esv.text: But when the officers came, they did not find them in the prison, so they returned and reported,

cnv.text: 差役到了監裡，找不到他們，回來報告說：

ccb.text: 差役来到监狱时，发现使徒已经不见了，就回去禀告，说：

csbs.text: 但差役们到了监狱里，却找不到他们，就回去报告，
